_context_order.prompt: Describe the story in broad strokes.
What is the current scene in the story?
What are the relevant details? Start with a list of relevant characters.
Now, describe each of the relevant characters.
Now, retrieve specific lines earlier in the story that might be relevant.
Repeat the details of the current scene.

general_info:
Synopsis --- {{synopsis}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.general_info.synopsis
Main Objective --- {{main_objective}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.general_info.main_objective
Themes --- {{(themes.values()|list|join(', ')) if themes is mapping else (themes|join(', '))}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.general_info.themes
Tone --- {{tone}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.general_info.tone
Writing Style --- {{writing_style}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.general_info.writing_style
arcs:
{% for arc in data %}
Arc [{{loop.index}}] --- {{arc.title}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.arcs[{{loop.index0}}]
Status --- {{arc.status}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.arcs[{{loop.index0}}].status
Scenes --- {{(arc.scenes.values()|list|join(', ')) if arc.scenes is mapping else (arc.scenes|join(', '))}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.arcs[{{loop.index0}}].scenes
Summary --- {{arc.summary}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.arcs[{{loop.index0}}].summary
Character Arcs --- {{arc.character_arcs}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.arcs[{{loop.index0}}].character_arcs
Relationship Shifts --- {{arc.relationship_shifts}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.arcs[{{loop.index0}}].relationship_shifts

{% endfor %}
